queries.query: Triton Marine Systems LLP, a status holder in the marine sector based in Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, received a Duty Credit Certificate under para 3.7 of the Foreign Trade Policy in March 2009. Customs authorities at Vizag port are now questioning whether the substituted wording in the amended notification — which replaced the operative clause of Notification 73/2006 — applies retrospectively to certificates issued before the amendment date, and whether the goods must satisfy both the para 3.7 specification and the serial 509 requirement simultaneously or in the alternative.
